title: cineraria alpestris subsp. ovirensis
intro: Cineraria alpestris subsp. ovirensis, also known as the Mountain cineraria or African cineraria, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its saponin and flavonoid content. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is typically used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, often in combination with other plants to enhance its medicinal properties.
